purpose: Release integrity ledger for PhantomForce decisions that must not disappear, regress, or be resurrected by stale worktrees.

rules.title: Live admin must serve the canonical Windows checkout
rules.ownerDecision: Accepted admin work only counts as live when the local admin server serves phantomforce-live-social-analytics-20260712, not an old sibling checkout.

requiredPatterns.description: AGENTS documents the canonical served checkout.
The live-source doctor checks the running admin root.

liveChecks.description: 127.0.0.1 admin server root must match the checkout running this guard.
The stale July 6 worktree must never be the live admin root again.
Hermes/backend must run the same commit as the served checkout.

rules.title: Website Studio starts from the PhantomForce public site
rules.ownerDecision: Website Studio is for editing phantomforce.online first. It must not revert to a generic start screen or the old Termina store starter.

requiredPatterns.description: Blank Website Studio create opens the default public-site flow.
New blank site applies the PhantomForce public-site starter.
Empty UI says Edit the public site, not Start a website.
The template picker exposes the PhantomForce public-site starter.
The public-site starter is bound to phantomforce.online.

forbiddenPatterns.description: Old Termina starter must not return as the default template.

forbiddenPatterns.pattern: Your terminal, organized\. Your prompts, on tap\.
forbiddenPatterns.description: Old Termina hero copy must not return.

rules.title: Accounting means confirmed transactions
rules.ownerDecision: Money became Accounting. It must track real/imported transaction records. Pipeline, won quotes, and retainers belong to goals or offer potential, not cash truth.

requiredPatterns.description: The nav label is Accounting, not Money.
Accounting surface has a transaction-reader section.
Cash collected is explicitly from real transactions.
Chat answers route money questions to the actual ledger.
Finance connector contract forbids counting pipeline as cash.

forbiddenPatterns.pattern: pipeline is either closed or waiting to be built

rules.title: Saved memory and temporary history stay separate
rules.ownerDecision: Do not save hellos or throwaway chatter to durable memory. Temporary chat history is lower-value context and shreds after 10 days.

requiredPatterns.description: Temporary chat history has a 10-day retention cap.
Trivial chatter is filtered out.
Temporary chat history is typed separately from saved memory.

requiredPatterns.pattern: Temporary chat history is separate and shredded after
requiredPatterns.description: Memory UI tells the truth about separation and shredding.

requiredPatterns.pattern: temporary history should stay within the context window cap
requiredPatterns.description: Retention tests cover temporary history limits.

rules.title: Sidebar keeps structural utilities in the bottom zone
rules.ownerDecision: Settings, Developer, Away Mode, and Memory stay in the split bottom utility section. Customization must not flatten them back into the main nav.

requiredPatterns.description: Customization locks structural modules.
Customization preserves bottom nav zone.
Shell contains dedicated bottom nav.
Main shell renders bottom-zone items separately.

rules.title: Organization switches must change the data scope
rules.ownerDecision: PhantomForce and ChicagoShots are separate businesses. Switching orgs must switch the active org/session/tenant scope, and cross-org reads must be denied.

requiredPatterns.description: Browser org switch calls the backend.
Org switch uses the auth switch endpoint.
Workspace storage derives a tenant id from the active workspace.
Database auth tests cover denied cross-org switching.

requiredPatterns.pattern: Client ledger record must stay in client tenant
requiredPatterns.description: Memory/ledger tests verify tenant boundaries.
Publishing/run queue tests verify cross-org denial.

rules.title: Kingdom Breakers duel has one player castle and one bot castle
rules.ownerDecision: Duel vs bot is a simple two-castle artillery fight: player weapon on one side, bot weapon on the other, winner takes out the other Warden.

requiredPatterns.description: Duel mode builds its own two-castle level.
Shots target the opposite owner in duel mode.
Win/loss checks use each side's Warden.
Bot aims from its own weapon.
Server catalog points at the fixed Kingdom Breakers version.

forbiddenPatterns.description: Regression guard against checking only one side twice.
